text: Hey team, getting multiple reports that the mobile login is broken on Chrome. Blank screen. Same issue reported on GitHub I think.
Customer XYZ is furious because they got charged twice for the pro plan. Looks like a Stripe timeout issue on our end.
Can we get an ETA on dark mode? Enterprise client asked for it today.
The export to CSV button in the analytics tab is throwing a 500 error when the date range is > 30 days.
